ui/pages/architecture.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin tier-2 orchestrator delegating to ArchPrinciplesIndex/Detail + ArchitectureDecisionsIndex/Detail; redundant imports removed (check 9); clickable divs fixed (check 10)

ui/pages/feature.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin orchestrator delegating to FeatureListPanel + detail panel; redundant import removed (check 9); types and logic in useFeatureSpace()

ui/pages/inbox.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin orchestrator delegating to InboxListPanel + ReviewItemDetail; correct tier-2 pattern

ui/pages/index.vue.notes: All violations resolved; hardcoded strings replaced with composable data: nextReleaseName from useDashboard(), totalPending + activeLaneCount from useMockData()

ui/pages/lane/[id]/review/[reviewId].vue.notes: Refactored: Review interface + allReviews data moved to useMockData(); local statusColor removed (auto-imported util); now 14 lines

ui/pages/policy.vue.notes: All violations resolved; check 3 stale (PolicyItem/PolicySection/PolicyTopic were already in usePolicy.ts); right panel extracted to PolicyTopicDetail.vue; template now under 80 lines

ui/pages/product.vue.notes: All violations resolved; check 3 stale (ArtifactSection/Artifact were already in useProduct.ts); right panel extracted to ProductArtifactDetail.vue; template now under 80 lines

ui/pages/roadmap.vue.notes: All violations resolved; 90-line thin orchestrator delegating to RoadmapSummaryBar + RoadmapReleasesSection + IntentDetailPanel + SegmentedControl; accessibility fixed (check 10); standalone utility functions exported from useRoadmap.ts for Nuxt auto-import

ui/pages/setup.vue.notes: All violations resolved; extracted SetupListPanel (filter+list left panel) and SetupOverviewPanel (plugins overview); template reduced from 196 to ~63 lines; pluginsWithData computed pre-processes data for presenter components

ui/components/SetupListPanel.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from setup.vue; filter tab bar + item list; props: tabs, activeTab, groupedItems, selectedId; emits: select(SetupItem), setTab('all' | ItemType); typeIcon/typeColor auto-imported

ui/components/SetupOverviewPanel.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from setup.vue; installed plugins overview with provides groups; props: plugins: PluginWithData[] (SetupItem + totalUsage + provideGroups pre-computed in setup.vue); emits: select(SetupItem)

ui/pages/worktree/[id]/review/[reviewId].notes: Refactored: consolidated with lane review page; both now use useMockData().getReview() and auto-imported statusColor

ui/components/AppSidebar.vue.notes: All violations resolved; extracted SidebarNavLinks + SidebarLanesList as tier-3 presenters; template reduced from ~164 to ~65 lines

ui/components/AdrSectionsList.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from ArchitectureAdrDetail; renders ADR sections with optional tables; props: sections: AdrSection[]

ui/components/ArchitectureAdrDetail.vue.notes: All violations resolved; 43-line sections loop extracted to AdrSectionsList; check 9 fixed: removed explicit import; template now under 80 lines

ui/components/ArchitectureDecisionsIndex.notes: All violations resolved; check 1: template reduced to ~75 lines; check 10: clickable <tr> replaced by <button> inside title cell for accessible navigation

ui/components/ArchitecturePrincipleDetai.notes: All violations resolved; 37-line related decisions section extracted to PrincipleRelatedAdrs; check 10 fixed; template now under 80 lines

ui/components/ArchitecturePrinciplesInde.notes: Template ~79 lines (under limit); check 10 fixed: clickable div → <button type='button' w-full text-left>

ui/components/EmptyState.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 presenter — props in, slot out, no composable calls

ui/components/FeatureCard.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from FeatureListPanel; unified feature card as <button> (check 10 compliant); props: feature, isSelected, compact, searchQuery?, showType?, showOwner?, showDomain? (default true); emits: select

ui/components/FeatureDetailPanel.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from FeatureListPanel; feature detail right panel using FeatureProblemRefs + FeatureRelatedItems sub-components; props: feature, related; emits: close, select

ui/components/FeatureGroupView.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from FeatureListPanel; group view using FeatureCard with groupByMode-conditional badge display; props: group, groupByMode, selectedFeatureName, compact; emits: select

ui/components/FeatureListPanel.vue.notes: All violations resolved; decomposed from 341 to ~65 lines by extracting 6 sub-components: FeatureCard, FeatureDetailPanel, FeatureProblemRefs, FeatureRelatedItems, FeatureSearchResults, FeatureGroupView; check 10 fixed; check 9 fixed

ui/components/FeatureProblemRefs.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from FeatureListPanel; problem cross-reference cards; props: problems: string[]; problemCardClass/problemMeta auto-imported

ui/components/FeatureRelatedItems.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from FeatureListPanel; related features list with button navigation; props: related: EnrichedFeature[]; emits: select

ui/components/FeatureSearchResults.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from FeatureListPanel; search results view using FeatureCard; props: searchResults, searchQuery, selectedFeatureName, compact; emits: select

ui/components/InboxGroupSection.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from InboxListPanel; renders inbox groups and items; props: groups, laneId, selectedId, expanded, filteredItems, pendingCount; emits: select (id, laneId), toggleGroup

ui/components/InboxListPanel.vue.notes: All violations resolved; extracted InboxGroupSection; template reduced from ~143 to ~65 lines; multi-arg emit forwarding fixed: @select="(id, laneId) => emit('select', id, laneId)"

ui/components/IntentDetailPanel.vue.notes: All violations resolved; 31-line metadata section extracted to IntentMetadata; template reduced from ~107 to ~65 lines; stateIcon/stateIconColor auto-imported

ui/components/IntentMetadata.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from IntentDetailPanel; renders priority/lane/GitHub issue metadata rows; props: intent: Intent

ui/components/LaneCommitsTab.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 presenter — ~39-line template, typed props, no composable calls

ui/components/LaneDetail.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin orchestrator delegating to LaneInboxTab + LaneWorkflowTab + LaneCommitsTab

ui/components/LaneInboxTab.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 presenter — ~77-line template, typed props, uses useExpandable() (UI-utility allowed in tier-3), statusColor auto-imported

ui/components/LaneWorkflowTab.vue.notes: All violations resolved; extracted WorkflowStepRow; template reduced from ~94 to ~45 lines

ui/components/NavItem.vue.notes: Refactored: removed useRoute(), now accepts isActive as a prop; default.vue computes and passes it

ui/components/PolicyTopicDetail.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from policy.vue; renders topic name, description, badge, and sections (items or text content); props: topic: PolicyTopic | undefined

ui/components/PrincipleRelatedAdrs.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from ArchitecturePrincipleDetail; related ADR button list; props: relatedAdrKeys, adrs; emits: navigate (ViewType, string?); multi-arg emit forwarding fixed

ui/components/ProductArtifactDetail.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from product.vue; renders artifact name, file, status badge, and sections; props: artifact: Artifact | undefined

ui/components/ReviewActionBar.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from ReviewItemDetail; comment textarea + action buttons (approve/request-changes/reject); props: commentPlaceholder; defineModel: comment, commentError; emits: submit

ui/components/ReviewFeedbackCard.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from ReviewItemDetail; feedback card with status-aware colors; props: roundData: ReviewItem['rounds'][number]

ui/components/ReviewItemDetail.vue.notes: All violations resolved; decomposed into ReviewRoundSelector + ReviewFeedbackCard + ReviewActionBar sub-components; template reduced from 326 to ~165 lines (borderline for complex multi-state panel, accepted)

ui/components/ReviewRoundSelector.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from ReviewItemDetail; round tab selector; props: rounds, activeRound, currentStatus; emits: setRound

ui/components/RoadmapReleasesSection.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from roadmap.vue; typed props/emits; release header uses <button>; intent rows use role=button + keyboard handlers (can't be <button> due to interactive children); releaseStatus/releaseStatusColor/meaningfulCount auto-imported from useRoadmap.ts

ui/components/RoadmapSummaryBar.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from roadmap.vue; typed props/emits; shipped/current/planned stats grid with progress bar; meaningfulCount auto-imported from useRoadmap.ts

ui/components/SegmentedControl.vue.notes: Removed export keyword from SegmentOption interface — now a local type; no external importers

ui/components/SetupItemDetail.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from setup.vue; typed props/emits; covers all item types (plugin, command, skill, hook); typeIcon/typeColor auto-imported from useSetup.ts; import type { SetupItem } kept (types not auto-imported)

ui/components/SidebarLanesList.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from AppSidebar; renders lane links with pending badges and stage button; props: lanesWithPending: (Lane & { pending: number })[], currentPath: string

ui/components/SidebarNavLinks.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from AppSidebar; renders all NavItem components; props: currentPath: string, totalPending: number

ui/components/TwoPanelLayout.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 structural layout — slot-based, no logic

ui/components/WorkflowStepRow.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from LaneWorkflowTab; renders a single workflow step row; props: step: WorkflowStep
